title: Ultra Crispy Ukrainian Eggplant Dumplings
description: Roasted eggplant rounds coated in a flour and egg batter, deep‑fried to a golden crisp, then finished in the oven and tossed in a bright vinaigrette for an indulgent ovo‑vegetarian dish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and slice each eggplant into 1-inch thick rounds.
Sprinkle each slice with salt and let sit for 15 minutes to draw out bitterness, then rinse and pat dry.
In a shallow dish whisk together flour, 1 tsp sugar, and ½ tsp black pepper.
In a separate bowl beat the egg with a pinch of salt; set aside.
Coat each eggplant slice first in flour mixture, then dip in beaten egg, and finally dredge again in flour; set aside.
Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat; when shimmering, add slices in a single layer without crowding and fry until golden and crisp on both sides, about 3 minutes per side.
Transfer fried slices to a parchment‑lined tray and bake in the preheated oven for 8 minutes to finish roasting.
While the dumplings roast, whisk together vinegar, mustard, honey, olive oil, dill, salt, pepper, and water until emulsified to make vinaigrette.
Remove dumplings from oven, drizzle evenly with vinaigrette, and serve immediately.
Optionally garnish with extra dill and a squeeze of lemon juice for brightness.
